item.title: BigT Britax LED Beacons Pack v1.59 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 22, 2026

BigT Britax LED Beacons Pack v1.59 ETS2

Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6602.000 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6602.000 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6612.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6612.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6624.000 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6624.000 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6634.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6634.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6642.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6642.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6654.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6654.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6662.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6662.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6674.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6674.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6682.200 (Rotating)
Britax Aerolite LED LightBar A6682.200 (Blizz)
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13722.000
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13722.040
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13732.200
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13732.240
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13752.200
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13752.240
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13772.200
Britax Aerolite Low Profile LED LightBar A13772.240
Britax B160 LED Beacon (Blizz Version)
Britax B160 LED Beacon (Rotating Version)
Britax B200 LED Beacon Clear Glass (Blizz Version)
Britax B200 LED Beacon Amber Glass (Blizz Version)
Britax B201 LED Beacon Clear Glass (Blizz Version)
Britax B201 LED Beacon Amber Glass (Blizz Version)
Britax B200 LED Beacon Clear Glass (Rotating Version)
Britax B200 LED Beacon Amber Glass (Rotating Version)
Britax B201 LED Beacon Clear Glass (Rotating Version)
Britax B201 LED Beacon Amber Glass (Rotating Version)
Britax L77 LED Flash Beacon (Blizz Horizontal Version)
Britax L77 LED Flash Beacon (Blizz Vertical Version)
Britax L94 LED Flash Beacon (Blizz Version)
Britax L95 LED Flash Beacon (Blizz Horizontal Version)
Britax L95 LED Flash Beacon (Blizz Vertical Version)
Britax L77 LED Flash Beacon (Running Horizontal Version)
Britax L77 LED Flash Beacon (Running Vertical Version)
Britax L95 LED Flash Beacon (Running Horizontal Version)
Britax L95 LED Flash Beacon (Running Vertical Version)

Adaptation to the latest versions 1.58 and 1.59.
Fixed the display of some 3D models, which the author himself hid.
All the MAT files in the automat folder have been updated

Credits: Big T

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Projekt Polskie Drogi 1:5 v1.35 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 22, 2026

Projekt Polskie Drogi 1:5 v1.35 ETS2

1:5 recreation of southwest Poland
Realistic Companies with parking spots
1:5 Time scale
Added custom pedestrians.
Pedestrians cross road at “zebra crossing”
Beautiful sceneries to discover
Custom models

Cities on the map:
Bolesławiec
Wrocław
Bielany Wrocławskie
Gniechowice
Łagiewniki
Dzierżoniów
Świdnica
Świebodzice
Wałbrzych
Jedlina-Zdrój
Ząbkowice
Kłodzko
Kudowa-Zdrój
Strzelin
Brzeg
Kąty Wrocławskie
Legnica
Kaczorów

DLC Dependencies: Going East, Scandinavia, Vive la France, Italia, Beyond The Baltic Sea, Road To The Black Sea, Iberia, West Balkans

– Adaptation for version 1.58.
– Added DK34 and DK3 Road between Świebodzice and Kaczorów
– Added City – Kaczorów
– Added DW381 Road between Jedlina Zdrój and Głuszyca

Credits: Iwus, Adam J, DamianSVW, Jakubek1993

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Sound Fixes Pack v26.18 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 22, 2026

Sound Fixes Pack v26.18 ATS

v26.18
1 new music track (with public domain status) for the music in cars feature for some vehicles in AI traffic.
Minor sound mixing adjustments for the far distance attenuation of the railroad car sounds for freight trains.
1.59 Traffic Sound Rework merge: Added music (rare probability) playing to more vehicles in AI traffic. [ATS edition]
New tire sound profile in testing for the 2013 Tesla Model S in AI traffic. [ATS edition]
New tire sound profile in testing for the 2022 Toyota Tundra in AI traffic. [ATS edition]

DESCRIPTION:
Feature list
The mod features meticulously crafted sounds, covering the following:
Suspension and tire bump sounds for your truck and trailer.
Fuel / filling station sounds.
Door close and seatbelt sounds after refueling.
Train sound enhancements for several locomotives and railroad cars.
Country/state specific railroad crossing bell sounds.
The most complete tire sound package for all terrains: asphalt, gravel, grass, snow, and sleeper lines.
Wet tire sound for the player’s truck tires when the asphalt roads are wet.
Reworked tire screech/skid sound effects.
Nokia phone ringtone sound replacing the hurry up / late music, leading to less stress for the player.
Default common sound reworks, such as improved default air brake sounds.
AI traffic vehicle sound improvements, with engine and horn sounds uniquely set for hundreds of specific vehicles.
(ETS2 only) Several countries supported with local police siren sounds.
English AU/UK/US voice navigation variants with speaker effect added and uncustomary phrases removed.
Wind buffeting and rush of air sounds at high speeds only when the window is open.
More environmental and ambient sounds, and tasteful changes to existing ambient sounds in the game world.
Trailer coupling, trailer brace rotation, and trailer sliding axle sounds.
6 standalone air horns.
Dynamic rain sounds, and an assortment of different thunder sounds with delay.
Default gear grinding sound effect additions and improvements.
Enhanced reverb zones, including stronger reverb when under bridges and overpasses.
(ATS only) Drawbridge lift warning sound for the Columbia River Interstate Bridge.
(ATS only) Working sounds for the Musical Road on the Historic Route 66.
(Optional) Reefer / refrigerated trailer sound functionality.
(Optional – ATS only) Cop scouting reports via CB radio (enable in voice navigation options).
Fixes for World Ambient sound glitches from the vanilla game and/or mods.
A couple of UI sound replacements in the Driving Academy module.

Minimum requirements
Requires higher priority in Mod Manager than:
any rain sound mods
any AI traffic related mods
any map mods (e.g. ProMods)

Compatibility
ATS 1.59. No errors in game log. Must have high priority in Mod Manager.
Does not replace individual player truck sounds, so this mod can be used with an unlimited amount of truck sound mods of your choice.
Compatible with all maps and all trucks, including truck mods.
Supported in single-player and multiplayer Convoy mode, and is marked as an optional mod in Convoy.

Credits: Drive Safely

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Sound Fixes Pack v26.18 ETS2
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 22, 2026

Sound Fixes Pack v26.18 ETS2

Changelog v26.18
Compatibility update for future update of the Reefer trailer sound addon. [ETS2 edition]
1.59 Traffic Sound Rework merge: Added music (rare probability) playing in some vehicles in AI traffic. [ETS2 edition]
Applied engine and horn sounds to the 2023 DAF XD in AI traffic. [ETS2 edition]
2 new idle sound effect variations added for the 2021 DAF XF/XG/XG+ and the 2023 DAF XD in AI traffic. [ETS2 edition]
File clean-up: removed unused files. [ETS2 edition]
1 new music track (with public domain status) for the music in cars feature for some vehicles in AI traffic.
Minor sound mixing adjustments for the far distance attenuation of the railroad car sounds for freight trains.

Description
The mod features meticulously crafted sounds, covering the following:

Suspension and tire bump sounds for your truck and trailer.
Fuel / filling station sounds.
Door close and seatbelt sounds after refueling.
Train sound enhancements for several locomotives and railroad cars.
Country/state specific railroad crossing bell sounds.
The most complete tire sound package for all terrains: asphalt, gravel, grass, snow, and sleeper lines.
Wet tire sound for the player’s truck tires when the asphalt roads are wet.
Reworked tire screech/skid sound effects.
Nokia phone ringtone sound replacing the hurry up / late music, leading to less stress for the player.
Default common sound reworks, such as improved default air brake sounds.
AI traffic vehicle sound improvements, with engine and horn sounds uniquely set for hundreds of specific vehicles.
(ETS2 only) Several countries supported with local police siren sounds.
English AU/UK/US voice navigation variants with speaker effect added and uncustomary phrases removed.
Wind buffeting and rush of air sounds at high speeds only when the window is open.
More environmental and ambient sounds, and tasteful changes to existing ambient sounds in the game world.
Trailer coupling, trailer brace rotation, and trailer sliding axle sounds.
Extended sound sequence for the uncoupling of semi-trailers.
8 standalone air horns.
Dynamic rain sounds, and an assortment of different thunder sounds with delay.
Default gear grinding sound effect additions and improvements.
Enhanced reverb zones, including stronger reverb when under bridges and overpasses.
(ATS only) Drawbridge lift warning sound for the Columbia River Interstate Bridge.
(ATS only) Working sounds for the Musical Road on the Historic Route 66.
(Optional) Reefer / refrigerated trailer sound functionality.
(Optional – ATS only) Cop scouting reports via CB radio (enable in voice navigation options).
Fixes for World Ambient sound glitches from the vanilla game and/or mods.
A couple of UI sound replacements in the Driving Academy module.

For further immersion, the mod may also include official paint colors and more authentic specifications for each AI traffic vehicle it modifies for sound. Rarer paint colors are less likely to be seen.

Compatibility
ETS2 1.59. No errors in game log. Must have high priority in Mod Manager.
Does not replace individual player truck sounds, so this mod can be used with an unlimited amount of truck sound mods of your choice.
Compatible with all maps and all trucks, including truck mods.
Supported in single-player and multiplayer Convoy mode, and is marked as an optional mod in Convoy.
Minimum requirements

Requires higher priority in Mod Manager than:
any rain sound mods
any AI traffic related mods
any map mods (e.g. ProMods)

Credits: Drive Safely

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD

item.title: Alka Customs Trucks W990 v1.8 1.58 ATS
item.description:
Euro Truck Simulator 2 Mods | American Truck Simulator Mods | April 22, 2026

Alka Customs Trucks W990 v1.8 1.58 ATS

Features:
3 Cabins
7 Chassis
Lots of engines
Custom headlights
High quality interior
10/13/18 speed transmissions
Many options for tunings
Template
Adapted for 1.58

Credits: Alka Customs

How to install ETS2 mods or ATS Mods
In Euro Truck Simulator 2 it’s easy to install mods. You just need to download mod from here, copy/unzip files into: “My Documents\Euro Truck Simulator 2\mod” folder or if you play ATS please install mods to: “My Documents\American Truck Simulator\mod” folder. To unzip files you can use: WinRAR or 7zip. After that you need to activate the mods you want to use.
Report bugs in the comments and help modders improve this mod. Always check the comments, you can find a solution.

DOWNLOAD MOD
